blessings.name: Akatosh
blessings.follower: Attacks and spells are stronger against dragons.
blessings.devotee: Turn the Hourglass: Reset shout cooldown.
blessings.tenets: Fulfill your destiny by saving Tamriel.

blessings.name: Talos
blessings.shrine: Fortify Shouts: Time between shouts reduced 20%.
blessings.follower: Attacks and shouts against elves are increased.
blessings.devotee: Dragon of the North: Shout cooldown halved on kill.
blessings.tenets: Bring the Civil War to a conclusion.

blessings.name: Mara
blessings.shrine: Fortify Restoration: Restoration spells cost 10% less.
blessings.devotee: Aura of Peace: Heal nearby allies.
blessings.tenets: Be married. Own one or more houses.
